title: feat: port parallel runner feature from upstream SignalPilot
description:
## Summary
- **Parallel Runner**: RunManager spawns up to 10 concurrent sibling Docker worker containers, each running the full Buddy agent with its own git repo volume; Worker DB model, 12 parallel API endpoints on agent server, dashboard backend proxy endpoints, and frontend with useParallelRuns hook, ParallelRunsView/ParallelRunsPanel/SlotCard components
- **Mobile Layout**: useMobile hook, MobileTab bottom bar, MobileControlSheet drawer, touch-friendly CSS media queries
- **Legacy Cleanup**: Removed single-runner proxy layer from dashboard backend and dead Resume Run button; parallel runner is now the only code path
- **Tunnel Manager**: TunnelPopover component, useTunnel hook, /api/tunnel/* backend endpoints using Docker SDK
- **Remote Access**: Fixed getApiBase() to return relative URLs enabling API calls through Cloudflare tunnel; SSE polling fallback (1s HTTP polling after 3s SSE timeout)
- **Security**: ParallelRunId path validator (8-char hex) on all parallel endpoints; React ErrorBoundary for malformed data resilience
- **Robustness**: Graceful worker shutdown on orchestrator exit; monitor error resilience for DB failures; SSE terminal status detection during chatty runs; parallel status error surfacing in UI
- **Rate Limiting**: Sliding-window rate limiter on /api/parallel/start (max 5 per minute) to prevent container spawn abuse
- **WorkTree Utils**: Extracted buildTreeFromDiff, extractFileChanges, norm utilities into shared lib/worktree-utils.ts for reuse and testability
- **Accessibility**: aria-label on icon-only buttons
- **Event Feed**: useMemo-based SSE event deduplication; repo filter persisted in localStorage with auto-select suppression

## Tests
- 222 backend tests (72 existing + 127 parallel runner + 23 dashboard endpoint)
- 64 frontend unit tests (vitest) covering groupEvents, getToolCategory, worktree-utils, and format utilities
- TypeScript compiles with zero errors; ruff reports zero violations
